name: 🚀 Build BankNifty Bot APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:  # Manual trigger

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read

    steps:
    - name: 📥 Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: 🗑️ Clean workspace
      run: |
        rm -rf app/build
        rm -rf .gradle

    - name: ☕ Setup JDK 17
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '17'
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: 🔧 Grant execute permission
      run: chmod +x ./gradlew

    - name: 🧹 Clean project
      run: ./gradlew clean

    - name: 🔨 Build Debug APK
      run: ./gradlew assembleDebug --stacktrace --info

    - name: 📦 Verify APK
      run: |
        ls -la app/build/outputs/apk/debug/
        file app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk

    - name: 📤 Upload APK
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: BankNiftyBot-${{ github.sha }}.apk
        path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
        retention-days: 30

    - name: 📊 Generate report
      if: always()
      run: |
        echo "✅ Build completed!"
        echo "📱 APK: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk"
        echo "💾 Artifacts ready for download"

  notify:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    steps:
    - name: 📱 Send Telegram notification
      uses: appleboy/telegram-action@v0.1.5
      with:
        to: "{{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}"
        token: "{{ secrets.TELEGRAM_TOKEN }}"
        message: |
          🤖 *BankNifty Bot APK Ready!*
          Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
          Status: ${{ job.status }}
          Download: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
